stemHtml: An aircraft equipped with trailing edge flaps and leading-edge slats is about to take-off and extends the devices to the take-off position. Due to a malfunction, the slats on the right wing remain retracted. If the malfunction goes undetected, the possible consequences are that...

options.a: the port side wing could stall upon trailing edge flap retraction.
options.b: the starboard wing could stall shortly after rotation.
options.c: there will be a strong rolling tendency to the starboard side.
options.d: the aircraft will enter a spiral dive to the starboard side.
